English: Our very nation is founded on the sacred generator cities. Now we finally have the technology to manufacture more steamcores to a point where our captain can decide where and when to build a generator city. So... this is what our best and brightest came up with

In the centuries prior we focused on siberia allowing the rest of the world to be colonized by the other meddleing european powers. There is but 1 frontier that remains for the claiming, Arctic canada. As it so happens we are experts on all things arctic.

In the 1700s plans were made to colonize alaska. Then war happened and we lost vital ports needed for this expansion. Now we have finally reached a point where we can do it again and legally we do have a claim: "1000 ducats for greenland" says an old document. Now while this document refers to the island of greenland we can claim that it is the colony called greenland IT IS FOOLPROOF!
